overview_zh: 本期从 181 个结构化来源中生成，候选 144 条，跨期排除历史已展示 124 条，入选 17 条。所有条目均保留原始来源链接；若真实抓取不足，则仅发布未展示过的来源索引记录，不用测试数据冒充更新。
overview_en: This brief is generated from 181 structured sources with 144 candidates, 124 previously displayed items excluded, and 17 selected items. Every item keeps an original source link; if live fetching is insufficient, the site publishes only not-yet-shown source-index records instead of fake news.

items.summary_en: Focus: News Highlights: NVIDIA technology runs 81% of the TOP500 and 90% of the systems new to the list. 26 systems on the TOP500 adopted the NVIDIA Grace CPU, up eight from the previous list. items.title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
items.summary_zh: 重点：GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.

items.title: ParallelKernelBench: Frontier LLMs can't write fast multi-GPU kernels (yet)
items.summary_zh: 重点：ParallelKernelBench tests whether LLMs can write fast multi-GPU CUDA kernels across 87 real workloads. The best model solves under a third, but a few generated kernels beat any public implementation.

items.summary_en: Focus: You can now deploy a Node.js server to Vercel with zero configuration.
